title: TL11B ARCHIVED — Tuition and Enrolment Certificate - Flying School or Club - Canada.ca
content:
## ARCHIVED — TL11B Tuition and Enrolment Certificate - Flying School or Club

## Notice to the reader
Please use Forms T2202A and the TL11B for 2018 and previous years, when needed.
For 2019 and later years, these forms have been replaced with the T2202, Tuition and Enrolment Certificate .
You must download the accessible fillable PDF to your computer. Use Acrobat Reader 10 or later to open the file. Do not click the link to open it in your web browser.
- Download and save the PDF to your computer
- Open the downloaded PDF in Acrobat Reader 10 or later
Flying schools or clubs certified by Human Resources and Social Development use this form to certify a student pilot's eligible tuition fees if the student was at least 16 at the end of the year and taking the course to get or improve skills in an occupation.

## Ways to get the form
- Download and fill out with Acrobat Reader You must download and open fillable PDFs in Acrobat Reader 10 or higher. This form is no longer current. Previous year versions are available. Previous years: Accessible Fillable PDFs This form is also available for the years listed below: 2018 – Fillable PDF (tl11b-fill-18e.pdf) 2017 – Fillable PDF (tl11b-fill-17e.pdf) 2015 – Fillable PDF (tl11b-fill-15e.pdf) 2014 – Fillable PDF (tl11b-fill-14e.pdf) 2013 – Fillable PDF (tl11b-fill-13e.pdf) 2011 – Fillable PDF (tl11b-fill-11e.pdf) 2010 – Fillable PDF (tl11b-fill-10e.pdf) 2009 – Fillable PDF (tl11b-fill-09e.pdf)

### Ask for an alternate format
You can order alternate formats such as digital audio, electronic text, braille, and large print.
- Order alternate formats for persons with disabilities
- TL11A Tuition and Enrolment Certificate - University Outside Canada
- TL11D Tuition Fees Certificate - Educational Institutions Outside Canada for a Deemed Resident of Canada
- TL11C Tuition and Enrolment Certificate - Commuter to the United States
- P105 Students and Income Tax
